2606.29966.title: RiverONE: Generating Knowledge-Intensive VLM by Simulated Quantum Machines
2606.29966.paper_summary: Quantum computing provides a powerful paradigm for representing and transforming high-dimensional information through superposition, entanglement, and measurement-induced nonlinear features. While current quantum hardware is not yet practical for direct large-scale vision-language model (VLM) inference, simulated quantum computation can be used during model construction to generate structured parameters for compact classical AI systems. We build RiverONE, a lightweight vision-language model for quantum calibration plot understanding, using simulated quantum computation. It employs a specialized visual encoder and an InternVL-based language backbone. To compensate for compression-induced information loss, we introduce quantum-generated parameters, which are materialized as classical tensors after training. This allows RiverONE to run entirely on classical GPUs at inference time, with no quantum hardware or runtime quantum simulation. With approximately 1.9 billion parameters, RiverONE achieves at least 95\% of the performance of NVIDIA Ising Calibration 1 on quantum calibration plot understanding tasks while using less than 10\% of its parameter count. These results suggest that simulated quantum computation can serve as a practical construction-stage mechanism for building lightweight, knowledge-intensive scientific VLMs. Our code is available at https://github.com/THeWakeSystems/RiverOne.
2606.29966.paper_summary_zh: 量子計算提供了一種強大的範式，用於通過疊加、糾纏和測量引起的非線性特徵來表示和轉換高維信息。雖然當前的量子硬體尚未實際適用於直接的大規模視覺-語言模型（VLM）推理，但在模型構建過程中可以使用模擬量子計算來生成結構化參數，以便用於緊湊的經典人工智慧系統。我們構建了 RiverONE，一個輕量級的視覺-語言模型，用於量子校準圖理解，並使用模擬量子計算。它採用了專門的視覺編碼器和基於 InternVL 的語言骨幹。為了彌補壓縮引起的信息損失，我們引入了量子生成的參數，這些參數在訓練後以經典張量的形式實現。這使得 RiverONE 在推理時可以完全在經典 GPU 上運行，而無需量子硬體或運行時量子模擬。RiverONE 擁有約 19 億個參數，在量子校準圖理解任務上達到了 NVIDIA Ising Calibration 1 至少 95\% 的性能，同時使用的參數數量不到其 10\%。這些結果表明，模擬量子計算可以作為構建輕量級、知識密集型科學 VLM 的實用構建階段機制。我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/THeWakeSystems/RiverOne 獲得。
2606.29966.author: Xindian Ma et.al.
2606.29966.authors: Xindian Ma, Xinyu Long, Yefei Zhang, Yanchen Liu, Xianghao Li, Yufu Wen, Yike Hu, Yuedong Zhu, Zeyang Ma, Wen Qin, Yikun Wang, Peng Yang, Monan Wang, Teng Yu
